title: Driver gets a friendly nudge from Geetha
body_lines: Responding to a journalist MP Geetha Kumarasinghe said that there were discussions regarding the issuance of fuel during the next couple of days.

I believe that all parties should unite and that is the true aragalaya. I didn’t vote for the 20th Amendment but I like the 21st Amendment. It was because of the 19th Amendment that I lost my Parliamentary seat as well.
When asked if the President should resign she questioned why he should resign and nudged the driver to take off
